creator: vwe@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->closed

fix last GNATS operation: this is very unlikely a problem in FreeBSD 
but a configuration problem on the network path the station is connected 
to. closing this PR. 
Dear submitter: If you still think your PR is valid and the FreeBSD should 
work on something, please give us any reason to believe, this problem 
is not caused by a wrong ftp client / firewall configuration and we'll be 
happy to open this PR again.
